title: Elytra Creative Fly
description: Wearing an elytra grants creative fly
body:
## Overview

As the name says, in addition to its normal function, wearing an elytra <u>in the chestplate armor slot</u> grants creative fly.

By default, it is only compatible with soul elytra from deeper and darker, but you can add an item to the tag elytracreativefly/tags/item/elytra.json to make it give you creative fly when equipped in the chestplate slot.

If trinkets/curios is installed, <u>vanilla elytra</u> can be equipped in the <u>trinket slot</u> to give you creative fly.

If you <u>installed both this mod and trinkets/curios</u>, you do <u>NOT need Elytra Slot</u> mod.

Some interactions with other mods could cause creative fly to be disabled, if that happens, just re-equip the elytra.

## Feedback

This mod also exists on curseforge, for any problem, leave a comment on the [curseforge project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytracreativefly).
